title: Nat's Cozy Creations
description: A modpack revolving around the Create mod and Farmers' Delight, with a bunch of optimization mods as a base.
body:
A cozy modpack revolving around Create and Farmers' Delight. Create steampunk machines or build cozy cottages. The choice is yours.

The aim of the pack is to provide an enhanced create mod experience that can be fun even if you don't enjoy the more technical side. It's got a lot of optimisation mods, Farmer's delight for some great food, and a touch of magic with 'Enchanted: Witchcraft'.

This pack offers technical depth, while still maintaining the whimsy of the Create mod.
